scores.correctness_notes: Covers all key points: CollectStatusEvent fires after every hook, add_status() usage, collect_unit_status vs collect_app_status (leader only), framework picks highest priority, cannot use ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus. Complete working example provided.
scores.hallucination_notes: Priority order stated as 'Blocked > Maintenance > Waiting > Active' omitting 'error' at the top of the hierarchy, which is a minor inaccuracy but not a hallucination of a non-existent API. All APIs, method names, and class names are real and correct.
